description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
What's Changed
- Update translation.json by @StepanSad in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1595
- feat: support multiple reader windows on desktop, closes #259 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1596
- layout: add window borders on Linux, closes #1570 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1599
- css: named container classes for easier css customization, closes #1598 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1600
- fix: replace fallback book cover with new cover image by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1604
- layout: maintain the layout of anchor elements while increasing their tap target size, closes #1603 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1605
- Fix dev-web command by @vasi in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1606
- tts: handle invalid language code and show no voices hints, closes #1579 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1607
- tts: skip text to speech for rubys and footnote anchors, closes #1334 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1608
- layout: unset text indent inside of list elements by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1609
- translation: fix translation not working for table of contents by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1610
- sync: also sync book metadata by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1611
- ios: skip context menu when long-press on book cover, closes #1612 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1613
- release: version 0.9.65 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1614
- fix: update book cover image from metadata in sidebar by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1615
New Contributors
- @vasi made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1606
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.64...v0.95
